Title: Authorizes the New York power authority to supply electric energy to certain low-income households
Summary: Authorizes the New York power authority to supply electric energy to low-income households receiving assistance through the New York city human resources administration and the New York state office of temporary and disability assistance, and to designate such agencies and local social services districts as billing energy service companies.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public authorities law, in relation to authorizing the New York power authority to supply electric energy to certain low-income households; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof
